comments: The ratification packet explicitly includes the required M3 closure summary, M4 closure summary, M5 deviation note, continuity table for dispatch.json, and final ratification recommendation. Specifically, the packet provides M3 closure evidence with summary, artifacts, review decisions, and scope boundary note; M4 closure evidence with summary, artifacts, review decisions, and an explicit explanation for why M4 proceeded while ratification was pending; M5 deviation details covering who approved entry into M5, why continuation remained compliant, and whether the deviation itself received independent review; a continuity table mapping dispatch.json progression alongside iteration-state.json and decision artifacts; and a final recommendation stating which milestones and state transitions should be ratified and that no rollbacks are recommended. Git inspection of commit 30945a5 shows it modified only tasks/v0.7-m3-to-m5-ratification-packet.md and tasks/v0.7-m3-to-m5-ratification-review-packet.json, with no implementation files or workflow-state files touched by that commit.
